Chat Edit: ' ⚠️ Real-time streaming (infrastructure, not UI-wired)
- ⚠️ Chat history (in-memory only, no database)
- ⚠️ Context window (basic tracking, no dependency analysis)
- ⚠️ Inline edit mode (skeleton, no UI)

**Section 3: Planned But Not Started** (0% complete)
- ❌ Multi-agent parallelization
- ❌ External model API support
- ❌ Real LSP integration
- ❌ Semantic code search

**Section 4: Critical Gaps** (analysis & priority)
- 🔴 VS Code extension incompatibility (architectural blocker)
- 🟠 Real-time streaming UI (high priority, 2-3 weeks)
- 🟠 Inline edit mode (high priority, 3-4 weeks)
- 🟠 External model APIs (high priority, 4-6 weeks)
- 🟡 LSP integration (medium priority, 6-8 weeks)
- 🟡 Multi-agent parallelization (medium priority, 6-8 weeks)


Regardless of time contraints above lets knock all of these out and make them production ready!'

Chat Edit: 'HIGH PRIORITY - Blocking Compilation:

AgenticEngine signal declarations (streamToken, streamFinished, errorOccurred) - 8 errors
AgenticEngine method signatures (setModelSource, configureExternalModel) - 10 errors
ChatHistoryManager namespace resolution - 12 errors
LatencyMonitor/LatencyStatusPanel namespace qualification - 6 errors
MEDIUM PRIORITY - Framework Completeness:
5. MainWindow class visibility in main_v5.cpp
6. AgenticEngine::processMessage signature alignment
7. Qt::Masm bridge dispatchSignal access fix

LOW PRIORITY - Enhancement:
8. Full integration testing after compilation succeeds
9. Re-enable chat history and settings functionality
10. Production readiness observability (structured logging, metrics)'

Chat Edit: 'Recommendation: Ensure a GGUF model is selected in the UI before running @analyze commands, as the engine correctly detected that no local model was currently resident in memory.


These should be workable with the blobs as well!'

Chat Edit: 'Perfect! The CLI is working and showing all available commands. Now let's summarize what has been completed:

Summary
✅ Task 2 & 3 Complete: Implemented comprehensive CLI command handler with 40+ commands and successfully built RawrXD-CLI.exe

CLI Implementation Details:

Full Support:

Model management (load/unload/list/modelinfo) - Uses GGUFLoader directly
System telemetry (telemetry/snapshot) - Direct telemetry access
Overclock governor (g/a/r/overclock) - Full control via overclock_vendor
Settings management (save/loadsettings/settings)
File utilities (grep/read) - Native C++ implementations
Dual input modes: Command-line and single-key shortcuts
Redirects to Qt IDE (documented in help):

Inference (infer/stream/chat) - Requires Qt-based InferenceEngine
Agentic features (plan/execute/analyze/generate/refactor) - Requires AgenticEngine
Code analysis (patterns/improve) - Requires AI capabilities
Hot-reload (patch/revert) - Requires DebuggerHotReload manager
Semantic search - Requires AI search engine
Architecture:

CLI provides model inspection, system monitoring, and overclock control
Qt IDE (RawrXD-AgenticIDE) provides full inference, agentic planning, code generation, streaming
Users can load models in CLI, inspect metadata, monitor system, then switch to IDE for AI features
API server runs on port 11434 in both CLI and IDE modes
Build Output:

RawrXD-CLI.exe - 200+ lines of source, comprehensive command interface
Next Steps:

Search Qt IDE for remaining stubs (Task 4)
Implement Win32 integrations (Task 5)
Final validation - build both, test runtime, verify no crashes (Task 6)
The CLI now has a complete command interface with production-grade implementations for system features and clear guidance for AI features that require the full Qt IDE.'
